pi_items.source: Web search confirms crawler-test.com is a real public test website designed as a testing ground for web crawlers and SEO tools
Path appears in task.json description step 5 and setup_task.sh creates this directory structure at line 22
Path appears in task.json description step 6 and setup_task.sh creates this directory structure at line 23

Web search results confirm that Screaming Frog's link bulk exports use 'Source' and 'Destination' columns to represent source page and destination URL. Export script checks for these exact headers at lines 37-38.

Web search confirms Screaming Frog link exports include a 'Rel' column (which returns 'nofollow', 'sponsored', or 'ugc') and a 'Follow' column (which returns 'True' or 'False'). For nofollow links, Follow='False' and Rel='nofollow'.

privileged_info_summary: Task targets https://crawler-test.com/, a real public website designed as a testing ground for web crawlers. The task requires using Screaming Frog SEO Spider to crawl the site and export internal nofollow outlinks as a CSV file with Source and Destination columns to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/internal_nofollow_report.csv, plus a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/nofollow_summary.txt. The CSV will contain data with 'false' values in the Follow column and 'nofollow' values in the Rel column for nofollow links. The data is real (not synthetic) from the actual crawler-test.com website.
